channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistan's Army Chief Plays Key Role in Peace Talks Between US and Iran
item.description: Pakistan's army chief, Asim Munir, has been actively working to mediate between the US and Iran in an attempt to end the ongoing conflict. In a significant development, Munir spoke with former US Pres...

item.title: Who is the Key Figure in Iran the U.S. is Negotiating With?
item.description: In the midst of rising tensions between the United States and Iran, President Donald Trump has mentioned that the U.S. is in talks with a 'top person' in Iran's leadership, though he did not reveal th...

item.title: Tanzania implements 284 tax reforms to create fair and predictable system for investors
item.description: The Tanzanian government is speeding up tax reforms to make the business environment more attractive for investors, especially from China. During the 2026 Tanzanian–Chinese Enterprise Tax Exchange and...

item.title: UN report calls for urgent protection of declining migratory freshwater fish populations
item.description: A new United Nations report warns that migratory freshwater fish species have seen an alarming 81% drop in their populations over the last fifty years due to overfishing, pollution, and habitat disrup...

item.title: High Court rules Terror Lekota lacked mental capacity before death as estranged wife and partner clash over estate
item.description: The North Gauteng High Court in Pretoria has declared that veteran South African politician Mosiuoa “Terror” Lekota was of unsound mind and unable to manage his own affairs from 25 May 2025 until his ...

item.title: Tanzania pushes for Kiswahili recognition on global platforms to support content creators
item.description: Tanzania's Ministry of Information, Culture, Arts, and Sports is in talks with UNESCO and META to have Kiswahili officially recognized on major global platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok. T...

item.title: Reality TV coach Mel Schilling dies aged 54 after cancer battle
item.description: Mel Schilling, the 54-year-old relationship coach and reality TV personality from 'Married At First Sight' UK, has passed away after a prolonged battle with cancer. Her husband, Gareth Brisbane, confi...

item.title: LHC Rules Petition Against PM Shehbaz’s Acquittal in Money Laundering Case Not Maintainable
item.description: The Lahore High Court (LHC) has upheld an objection raised by its registrar’s office regarding the maintainability of a petition contesting the acquittal of Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and his sons,...

item.title: Inquest investigates death of 12-year-old girl linked to Snapchat bullying in West Sussex
item.description: An inquest has heard that 12-year-old Amelia Bath from Walberton, West Sussex, took her own life after being bullied on the social media platform Snapchat. Amelia was found dead by her mother on the m...

item.title: Pakistan Offers to Mediate US-Iran Talks Amid Ongoing Conflict
item.description: Pakistan’s Prime Minister, Shehbaz Sharif, has offered to host diplomatic talks aimed at ending the ongoing conflict between the US and Iran, despite Iran’s insistence on fighting until complete victo...

item.title: Imran Khan's sisters denied meeting at Adiala Jail despite court orders, PTI demands enforcement of rights and medical access
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Sisters of PTI founder and former Prime Minister Imran Khan were once again not permitted to meet him at Rawalpindi's Adiala Jail on Monday. The party described this repeated denial as a bl...

item.title: President Ruto and Governor Orengo Agree to Work Together on Nyanza Development
item.description: President William Ruto visited the Nyanza Region and used the opportunity to signal a fresh truce with Siaya Governor James Orengo. The two leaders publicly agreed to put their past political differen...

item.title: Denmark holds elections as tensions rise over Trump’s Greenland bid
item.description: Voting is currently taking place in Denmark’s parliamentary elections, where Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen, leading the Social Democrats, seeks re-election for a third term. The election comes at a...

item.title: Essential workers unable to work from home struggle with rising fuel costs amid Australia's shortage
item.description: Australia is facing a serious fuel shortage, prompting the International Energy Agency and federal ministers to urge people to work from home where possible, use public transport, and reduce highway s...

item.title: Women Leaders Highlight the Importance of Creativity in Business
item.description: Women leaders in various industries are advocating for the increased value of creativity in driving innovation and success in the business world. According to several experts, creative intelligence ha...

item.title: Aditya Dhar's Dhurandhar Duology: Bollywood's Shift to Competent Civilisational Myth-Making
item.description: In this opinion piece, author Nirmalya Dutta analyses the massive success of Aditya Dhar's Dhurandhar duology starring Ranveer Singh and explains why it has triggered 'Dhurandhar Derangement Syndrome'...

item.title: Dungarpur Student Ishwar Patidar Secures 99.5% in RBSE Class 10 Exams and Plans for IAS Career
item.description: In a remarkable achievement, Ishwar Patidar, a young student from Dungarpur district in Rajasthan, has emerged as the district topper in the RBSE Class 10 board examinations for 2026 by scoring an imp...

item.title: How Biometric and Smart Device Data Are Undermining Privacy Rights
item.description: Andrew Guthrie Ferguson’s article explores how the growing use of biometric technologies and smart health devices has eroded Americans’ expectations of privacy. From smartwatches tracking heart rates ...

item.title: Thysse Cousins Face Off for SA Light Heavyweight Title in Golden Gloves Tournament
item.description: A highly anticipated family boxing match is set to take place on Saturday at Emperors Palace as cousins Bryan Thysse and Gerhard Thysse battle for the South African light heavyweight belt in the Golde...

item.title: Avi Lewis' Proposal to Expand Immigration and End the Safe Third Country Agreement
item.description: Avi Lewis, a frontrunner for the NDP leadership, has made bold immigration proposals, including reinstating post-COVID immigration levels and offering mass amnesty to temporary migrants. Lewis also ad...
